line_items.description: Deep Groove Ball Bearing, 6204-2RS, sealed, ABEC-3
Deep Groove Ball Bearing, 6205-2RS, sealed, ABEC-3
Deep Groove Ball Bearing, 6206-2RS, sealed, ABEC-3
Deep Groove Ball Bearing, 6304-2RS, sealed, ABEC-3
Pillow Block Bearing, UCP-205, 1" bore, cast iron
Jaw Coupling, L-095, 1" x 1" bore w/ NBR spider
NEMA 56 Drive Belt Pulley, 1HP rated, 1" bore

raw_notes:
Thank you for your request for quotation dated April 18, 2026 (your reference NSM-RFQ-0417). We are pleased to provide pricing for the items listed below. This quotation is valid for thirty (30) days from the date above and is subject to the terms and minimum order requirements detailed in the notes section.

Subtotal: $2,691.60
Estimated freight (UPS Ground to Reno NV): $84.50 (actual at time of shipment)
SC sales tax: Not applicable (out-of-state shipment)

Please note that our 6200-series and 6300-series deep groove ball bearings (line items 1 through 4) carry a minimum order quantity of 25 units per part number per order. Your quantities meet or exceed this threshold and no adjustment is required. We mention this for reference on future orders: a separate handling fee of $75.00 applies to any line falling below the per-SKU MOQ, and broken-package quantities are not available on these series.

Pillow block and flange bearing assemblies (lines 5 and 6) ship in cartons of 4 units. Quantities not divisible by 4 will be rounded up at our discretion to the nearest carton, and you will be billed at the rounded quantity. Your line 5 quantity of 12 units is exact; line 6 quantity of 8 units is exact. No rounding will occur on this order.

Jaw couplings (line 7) are sold individually and have no MOQ, however the L-095 NBR elastomer spider is a separate consumable and ships one per coupling at no additional charge. Replacement spiders are available under SKU CPL-LM-095-SPIDER at $4.80 each (5 unit minimum on spider-only orders).

Drive belt pulleys (line 8) are non-cancellable, non-returnable once cut to the requested bore size. Please confirm 1-inch bore specification on your purchase order acknowledgment.

Should you wish to proceed, please reference quotation number Q-26-1147 on your purchase order. We can typically ship 6200-series stock within two business days of PO receipt; the pillow block and flange assemblies may extend lead time to 7-10 business days depending on current inventory.

If you have any questions or wish to adjust quantities, please don't hesitate to contact me directly at the number above or at the email address listed.

Tom Reilly
Senior Account Manager
Precision Bearings & Drives Co.
